title: Update containers/image to fix commit layer issue
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Update container/image to address a commit error when copying layers and metadata.  This change may require users to recreate containers.  This change also required that the xz tools from ulikunitz be vendored too.  It was in the vendor.conf, but it doesn't appear that we actually vendored it.  I was unable to compile with the new container/image without vendoring it to.

@mtrmac PTAL.

Hopefully addresses #974

comments.body:

Might be time to start thinking about a new buildah release.
@mheon @baude, after this merges, you probably want to revendor Buildah in Podman
@rhatdan between this and the container/storage update alone, it's probably wise to get a new kit together soonish.
